[[commons:Category:Koyasu-myojin]][[ja:比比多神社]] {{Expand Japanese|比比多神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hibita Shrine (Q11547458) | native_name = 比比多神社 | image = KOYASUMYOUJIN.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hibita Shrine (Q11547458) | coordinates = {{coord|35.416111111111114|139.27972222222223}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Konohanasakuya-hime|lt=Konohananosakuya-bime|az|Konohanasakuya|ca|Konohana no Sakuya hime|de|Konohanasakuyahime|en|Konohanasakuya-hime|fa|کونوهاناساکویا-هیمه|fr|Konohana-no-Sakuya|ja|コノハナノサクヤビメ|ko|고노하나노사쿠야비메|mni|ꯀꯣꯅꯣꯍꯅꯁꯀꯨꯌ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Konohanasakuya-hime|ru|Коноханасакуя-химэ|sv|Konohanasakuyahime|th|เซ็นเง็ง|vi|Konohana Sakuya Hime|zh|木花開耶姬|qid=Q1781862|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} | established = {'time': '+0800-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 7, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} }} {{nihongo|'''Hibita Shrine'''|比比多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|lt=Isehara|ar|إسيهارا (كاناغاوا)|azb|ایسه‌هارا، کاناقاوا|be|Ісехара|ca|Isehara|ceb|Isehara|ce|Исехара|de|Isehara|en|Isehara, Kanagawa|eo|Isehara|es|Isehara|fa|ایسه‌هارا، کاناگاوا|fi|Isehara|fr|Isehara|gl|Isehara|it|Isehara|ja|伊勢原市|ko|이세하라시|mg|Isehara|mzn|ایسه‌هارا، کاناگاوا|nl|Isehara|no|Isehara|pl|Isehara|pt|Isehara|ro|Isehara|ru|Исехара|sh|Isehara|sr|Исехара|sv|Isehara|tg|Исеҳара|th|อิเซฮาระ|tl|Isehara, Kanagawa|tr|Isehara|tt|Исехара|uk|Ісехара|uz|Isehara (Kanagawa)|vi|Isehara, Kanagawa|war|Isehara, Kanagawa|zh_classical|伊勢原市|zh_min_nan|Isehara-chhī|zh_yue|伊勢原|zh|伊勢原市|qid=Q734520|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.416111111111114|139.27972222222223}} == inception (P571) == * {'time': '+0800-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 7, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} ** P1932: 天平年間 == image (P18) == * KOYASUMYOUJIN.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q1781862|ltq=Q1781862|qid=Q1781862|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} ** P1932: 神吾田鹿葦津姫命 == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|Q7311343|ltq=Q7311343|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q930545|ltq=Q930545|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ひびたじんじゃ == area (P2046) == * {'amount': '+512', 'unit': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q706688'} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5021005003964 == Commons category (P373) == * Koyasu-myojin == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039721|ltq=Q135039721|qid=Q135039721|1=Hihitano Shrine}} ** P3831: {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '神奈川県伊勢原市上粕屋1763-1', 'language': 'ja'} ** P7452: {{ill|Q29509043|ltq=Q29509043|qid=Q29509043|1=official}} * {'text': '神奈川県伊勢原市上粕屋1763', 'language': 'ja'} == day in year for periodic occurrence (P837) == * {{ill|Q2686|ltq=Q2686|qid=Q2686|1=July 15}} ** P3831: {{ill|Q11385469|ltq=Q11385469|qid=Q11385469|1=Reisai}} == image of entrance (P9721) == * Koyasu-myojin Torii.jpg {{commons category|Category:Koyasu-myojin}} [[JA:比比多神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11547458}} == Japanese content == {{Otheruses|one candidate for the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} "'''Hibita Shrine'''" in Kamikasuya, Isehara, Kanagawa|another candidate in Sannomiya, Isehara|Hibita Shrine}} {{神社 |名称=Hibita Shrine |画像=[[File:KOYASUMYOUJIN.jpg|260px]]
From front of haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=260|coord={{coord|35|24|57|N|139|16|47|E}}}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|qid=Q127513|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Isehara|Q734520|qid=Q734520|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}}1763-1 Kamikasuya |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|24|57|N|139|16|47|E|scale:25000}} |祭神={{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|qid=Q1781862|lt=Kamuatakaashitsuhime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}}{{sfn|新編相模国風土記稿 上糟屋村 子易明神社}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small) |創建=(trad.) {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} era{{sfn|新編相模国風土記稿 上糟屋村 子易明神社}} |別名=Koyasu Myōjin{{sfn|新編相模国風土記稿 上糟屋村 子易明神社}} |例祭={{ill|lt=July 15|Q2686|qid=Q2686|1=July 15}} }} '''Hibita Shrine''' (ひびたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Kamikasuya, {{ill|lt=Isehara|Q734520|qid=Q734520|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|Q127513|qid=Q127513|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. It is one of the candidate shrines ({{ill|lt=candidate shrine in Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=ronsha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}) for the '''Hibita Shrine''' recorded in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' of {{ill|lt=Enchō|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|1=Enchō}} 5 ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}), one of the 13 Engishiki shrines of {{ill|lt=Sagami Province|Q1053732|qid=Q1053732|1=Sagami Province}}{{sfn|新編相模国風土記稿 上糟屋村 子易明神社}}. Also called '''Koyasu Myōjin'''. === Enshrined deity === * Enshrined deity: Kamuatakaashitsuhime-no-Mikoto ({{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|qid=Q1781862|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}}) === History === In the {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} period, provincial guardian Someya Tarō Tokitada is said to have invited the deity praying for stability of the land and children. It was famed for efficacy in safe childbirth prayers. Later it became an imperial-prayer site of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|qid=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, but divine ranks, oracle documents, and old records were lost at the fall of Odawara in {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 18 ({{ill|lt=1590|Q6764|qid=Q6764|1=1590}}). After that it was called "Easy-Delivery Daimyōjin" or "Koyasu Daimyōjin" and revered as a guardian deity of safe childbirth. The other candidate shrine for the Shikinaisha Hibita Shrine is {{ill|lt=Hibita Shrine|Q11547364|qid=Q11547364|1=Hibita Shrine}} in Sannomiya, same city. Its tradition tells that an old plaque reading "Hibita Shrine" was once lent to the priest of Koyasu Myōjin Shrine and not returned, and then displayed there to claim Shikinaisha status{{sfn|新編相模国風土記稿 三ノ宮村 三宮明神社}}. There is no evidence for this story. Pillars of the haiden have become thinner because worshippers formerly shaved off small pieces as safe-birth charms (now prohibited). === Festivals === * January 1: {{ill|lt=Saitan-sai|Q11546824|qid=Q11546824|1=Saitan-sai}} (New Year festival) * Sunday after start of spring in February: {{ill|lt=Kinen-sai|Q118906710|qid=Q118906710|1=Kinensai}} (spring festival) * First horse day of early February: {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hatsuuma festival|1=UNKNOWN}} * July 15: '''{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Grand Annual Festival|1=UNKNOWN}}''' * November 23: {{ill|lt=Niiname-sai|Q11501518|qid=Q11501518|1=Niiname-no-Matsuri}} * December 31: {{ill|lt=Joya|Q7245702|qid=Q7245702|1=Chinese New Year's Eve}} festival * Monthly on 1st and 15th: monthly rite === Shrine-held items / cultural assets === * Beauty painting - by {{ill|lt=Utagawa Kunitsune|Q33319365|qid=Q33319365|1=Kunitsune Utagawa}}, dedicated in {{ill|lt=Kyōwa|Q960763|qid=Q960763|1=Kyōwa}} 2 ({{ill|lt=1802|Q6883|qid=Q6883|1=1802}}), 12th month * Ema - designated prefectural {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|qid=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}} dated Nov 4, {{ill|lt=1962|Q2764|qid=Q2764|1=1962}} ({{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 35){{sfn|伊勢原の指定文化財}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Nagi|1=UNKNOWN}} tree - city-designated preserved tree (one nagi leaf is placed in this shrine's skin-protection charm) === Access === *From north exit of {{ill|lt=Isehara Station|Q4205219|qid=Q4205219|1=Isehara Station}} on {{ill|lt=Odakyu Odawara Line|Q135176|qid=Q135176|1=Odakyū Odawara Line}} ({{ill|lt=Odakyu Electric Railway|Q83584|qid=Q83584|1=Odakyu Electric Railway}}), take {{ill|lt=Kanagawa Chūō Kōtsū|Q10854960|qid=Q10854960|1=Kanagawa Chuo Kotsu}} bus ({{ill|lt=Kanagawa Chūō Kōtsū Isehara Depot#Isehara Station North Exit - Oyama direction|Q11588882|qid=Q11588882|lt=route I10|1=route I10}}) toward {{ill|lt=Oyama Cable Station|Q864604|qid=Q864604|1=Ōyama Cable Car}}, get off at "Myōjin-mae," 1 minute walk. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * {{ill|lt=Shinpen Sagami no Kuni Fudoki Kō|Q11503942|qid=Q11503942|1=Shinpen Sagami no Kuni Fudoki-kō}} ** {{cite book|和書|title=Dai Nihon Chishi Taikei|volume=Vol.37 Shinpen Sagami no Kuni Fudoki Kō 2, Vol.44 Murazato-bu Ōsumi District 3|chapter=Kasuya-no-shō, Kamikasuya Village, Koyasu Myōjin Shrine|id={{NDLJP|1179210/189}}|ref={{sfnref|新編相模国風土記稿 上糟屋村 子易明神社}}|publisher=Yūzankaku|date=1932-8}} ** {{cite book|和書|title=Dai Nihon Chishi Taikei|volume=Vol.38 Shinpen Sagami no Kuni Fudoki Kō 3, Vol.50 Murazato-bu Ōsumi District 9|chapter=Kasuya-no-shō, Sannomiya Village, Sannomiya Myōjin Shrine|id={{NDLJP|1179219/54}}|ref={{sfnref|新編相模国風土記稿 三ノ宮村 三宮明神社}}|publisher=Yūzankaku|date=1932-8}} * {{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.city.isehara.kanagawa.jp/bunkazai/docs/2012100400077/|title=Isehara designated cultural property: Utagawa Kunitsune beauty-picture ema|website=Isehara City|accessdate=2021-12-4|date=2012-10-04|ref={{sfnref|伊勢原の指定文化財}}}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province|Q11582137|qid=Q11582137|1=List of Shikinaisha in Sagami Province}} * {{ill|lt=Hibita Shrine|Q11547364|qid=Q11547364|1=Hibita Shrine}} - one candidate shrine for Shikinaisha "Hibita Shrine" === External link === * [http://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=724&cd=1209167&scd=&npg=0 Hibita Shrine] (Kanagawa Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hibita Shrine (Q11547458)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hibita Shrine (Q11547458)]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sagami Province]] [[Category:Municipal History of Isehara]] [[Category:伊勢原市の建築物]]
